analysis.sensitivity_interpretation: tau sensitivity analysis: higher tau means stricter confidence gate, fewer tokens accepted in draft, more tokens refined. Lower tau = faster (more accepted) but potentially lower quality.

part3_confidence_partitioning.description: tau=0.0 (no gate, all tokens to refine) vs tau=0.9 (confidence gate)
